query:
SELECT m.course_id as courseId, m.id as moduleId, m.title_ar as titleAr, COUNT(q.id) as questionCount
FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.module_id = m.id
GROUP BY m.course_id, m.id, m.title_ar
ORDER BY m.course_id, m.id;

FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.module_id = m.id
GROUP BY m.course_id, m.id, m.title_ar
ORDER BY m.course_id, m.id;
